name: 05-31-stage2-rvv-base-memory-selected-body-owner-cleanup
title: Stage2 RVV base memory-movement selected-body owner cleanup
description: Move base memory-movement selected-body realization out of RVVSelectedBodyRealization.cpp into a dedicated owner module, keeping the central dispatcher neutral and preserving runtime ABI order, memory-form/mask/stride/index facts, provider-plan facts, fail-closed behavior, and emitted artifact evidence for strided load/store, indexed gather/scatter, and masked memory routes.
